rules.name: dec_01_Bank_Account_Number_UK
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND ((2 AND 3 AND (4 OR 5 OR 6)) OR (7 AND 8 AND (9 OR 10 OR 11)))
rules.label: UK

rules.name: dec_01_FinancialSystemSync_Yes
rules.conditionLogic: ((1 AND 2 AND 9) OR ((1 OR 3) AND 10) OR ((1 OR 4) AND 11) OR ((1 OR 5) AND 12) OR ((1 OR 6) AND 13) OR ((1 OR 7) AND 14) OR ((1 OR 8) AND 15))
rules.label: Yes

formulas.description: Determine whether reseller may be modified
formulas.name: fAllowResellerChange

formulas.description: Formula to skip '-' VAT numbers for VAT calculation on orders and invoices
formulas.name: fSub25VatNumber

recordLookups.description: Gets the primary SBI Look Up
recordLookups.name: dgr_01_Primary_SBI
recordLookups.label: 1. Primary SBI

recordLookups.description: Gets the secondary SBI 2 Look Up
recordLookups.name: dgr_01_Secondary_SBI
recordLookups.label: 1. Secondary SBI 1

recordLookups.description: Gets the Secondary 2 SBI Look Up
recordLookups.name: dgr_02_Secondary_SBI
recordLookups.label: 2. Secondary SBI 2
